label: Formal verification of agents & plans

node.label: Formal verification of agents & plans
node.definition: Formal agent verification checks plans, policies, tool sequences, or generated programs against state, temporal, safety, and authorization specifications.
node.why_it_matters: It adds a machine-checkable control layer between an agent’s proposal and an external side effect.
limitations: Open-world observations and underspecified environments make complete verification difficult, so runtime monitoring remains necessary.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Formal verification of agents & plans has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations because Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.

In this atlas graph, Formal verification of agents & plans has a `verifies_with` dependency on PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning because PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning is modeled as evidence or constraints for verification.

In this atlas graph, Formal verification of agents & plans has a `verifies_with` dependency on Structured outputs & typed action generation because Structured outputs & typed action generation is modeled as evidence or constraints for verification.

In this atlas graph, Formal verification of agents & plans has a `verifies_with` dependency on Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes because Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes is modeled as evidence or constraints for verification.

sentence_units.text: Formal agent verification checks plans, policies, tool sequences, or generated programs against state, temporal, safety, and authorization specifications.
It adds a machine-checkable control layer between an agent’s proposal and an external side effect.
Open-world observations and underspecified environments make complete verification difficult, so runtime monitoring remains necessary.
